Footer.description: Origin-driven sourcing for serious kitchens. Protected and heritage products from European producers — accessible across borders.
Footer.brandLine: IRISKA.AI · MEDITERRANEAN ORIGIN · EXPANDING BY STANDARD

Landing.heroDescription: Quality you can trace. Producers you can name. Protected and heritage products from European producers — accessible across borders, through one intelligent procurement platform.
Landing.imageAlt: Mediterranean charcuterie and cheese on a wooden board

howItWorks.step1Body: AI-powered search across a vetted catalog of protected and heritage European products. Filter by quality tier, origin, seasonality, or commercial vocabulary.
howItWorks.step2Body: Transparent prices, multi-rating quality scores, producer profiles. See trust indicators, packaging formats, and lead times before you commit.
howItWorks.step3Body: Multi-supplier checkout, single invoice, smart reorder predictions. Logistics handled. Disputes resolved. One platform across borders.

suppliersPreview.description: Iriska connects European producers of protected and heritage products with HoReCa buyers across the continent — without the noise of generic B2B marketplaces. One platform, multiple countries, transparent pricing.
suppliersPreview.benefit1Body: CSV import, fast manual editing, structured product data aligned with European GI registries.
suppliersPreview.benefit2Body: One supplier profile visible to restaurants across Spain, Italy, France, Portugal, Netherlands and more.
suppliersPreview.benefit3Body: Pay only on accepted orders. No listing fees, no platform subscription. Clear terms from day one.
suppliersPreview.benefit4Body: Your origin story, certifications and quality standards get the visibility they deserve.

Suppliers.heroDescription: Iriska is a platform built for European producers of protected and heritage products. Reach HoReCa buyers across borders without losing your margin to generic B2B marketplaces or unreliable resellers.

whyIriska.reason1Body: We don't list industrial products. Iriska accepts only PDO, PGI, TSG, AOP, DOP, AOC, Suisse Garantie, heritage producers, and quality-certified products. Your work appears alongside peers, not commodity goods.
whyIriska.reason2Body: One supplier profile visible to chefs and procurement teams across Spain, Italy, France, Portugal, Netherlands, Belgium, and growing. Sell to a Madrid restaurant or an Amsterdam hotel through the same dashboard.
whyIriska.reason3Body: No listing fees. No platform subscription. No exclusivity. You pay commission only on orders accepted by you, and only after the buyer has paid. Clear, written terms from day one.
whyIriska.reason4Body: Iriska's recommendation engine matches your products to relevant restaurants based on cuisine, menu, price tier, seasonality, and quality ratings. You don't compete on visibility — you appear when you fit.

howOnboarding.title2: to first order in weeks, not quarters.
howOnboarding.step1Body: We talk about your products, certifications, current channels, capacity, and target markets. No commitment yet — we make sure Iriska is the right platform for you, and you're the right fit for the catalog.
howOnboarding.step2Body: We help you create your supplier profile, import your product list (CSV or manual), and set pricing tiers. Your origin story, certifications, and producer credentials become the spine of how buyers find you.
howOnboarding.step3Body: Our team reviews your profile against Iriska standards. Where data is missing, we work with you to complete it. Once approved, your products go live in the catalog and become visible to buyers.
howOnboarding.step4Body: Buyers discover, compare, and order through the platform. You receive structured order requests, confirm or decline, fulfil through your existing logistics, and get paid through Iriska's payment infrastructure.

statsBlock.summary: {giCount} protected products. {producerCount} verified producers. {countryCount} origin countries. Growing.
statsBlock.description: Iriska's catalog already maps every protected designation across our starting territory. Your SKUs link directly to these references — buyers see your offering with full provenance context, not as anonymous line items.

closingCta.title: Tell us about your products.
closingCta.description: Send us a brief introduction — what you make, where, your certifications, and the markets you currently serve. We'll respond within two business days.

Catalog.title: European fine food catalog.
Catalog.description: {count, plural, =0 {No products yet.} one {# protected product} other {# protected products}} from verified European producers. Filter by country, category, or search by name.

results.tryAdjusting: Try adjusting your filters or clearing them.

CatalogDetail.noProducers: No verified producers listed yet for this product.

dataThinNotice.title: More information coming soon
dataThinNotice.body: We're enriching this product's data with verified producers, current pricing, and detailed information. Reach out if you're a producer or buyer interested in this category.
